zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Windsor於1466年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Thomas de Windsor25歲，母親Elizabeth Stratton Andrews22歲。她於1494年與Edmund Dudley Esq.在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在她的家鄉享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Windsor was born in 1466, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Windsor, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Stratton Andrews, was 22. She married Edmund Dudley Esq. in 1494, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1500, in her hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Windsor est née en 1466, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Windsor, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stratton Andrews, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Dudley Esq. en 1494, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Sie hat 1494 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Edmund Dudley Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 34 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Edmund Dudley Esq. nel 1494, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Windsor(이)가 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Windsor(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stratton Andrews(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Edmund Dudley Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 그녀의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: холи тринити минориесь, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Windsor родилась в 1466 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Windsor было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stratton Andrews, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Dudley Esq. в 1494 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1500 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Windsor nació en 1466, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Windsor, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stratton Andrews, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Edmund Dudley Esq. en 1494, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1500, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
